hero.name: Hugo!
hero.tagline: Building scalable enterprise systems used across finance, SaaS, and global operations.

centerbase.name: .Centerbase
centerbase.stack: .NET 9 • Next.js • SQL Server • Redis • Azure • GraphQL • Kafka • Microservices
centerbase.description: Large-scale multi-tenant SaaS platform supporting legal operations, accounting and billing workflows for hundreds of US law firms. Led backend and accounting initiatives across microservices migration, reporting architecture redesign and distributed system workflows, improving accounting report performance by over 300%.

toshiba.name: .Toshiba
toshiba.stack: Sitecore XP/XC 10, Oracle, SharePoint, ERP API, CI/CD, Tableau.
toshiba.description: Toshiba New Portal focuses on migrating Sitecore 9.x to 10.x while preserving existing business functionalities and implementing a modernized portal. The project establishes a scalable foundation for future Sitecore Commerce and B2B portal development, enhancing integration, reporting, and overall system performance.

aspire.name: .Aspire
aspire.stack: ASP.NET MVC 6, EF6, Azure, Redis, JavaScript, Adyen, OAG/Mulesoft APIs, Google Maps & Analytics.
aspire.description: Aspire Lifestyles is a scalable SaaS platform built on a reusable codebase, enabling rapid development and expansion of new business modules and services. It provides a global solution for booking two-way airport transfers with fixed pricing and professional drivers, operating across 16+ countries. Additionally, a dedicated portal was developed to manage accounting operations, including invoicing, payments, and customer credit, improving financial control and operational efficiency.

quotes: Hieu who mapped pretty much the entire accounting ecosystem.
⭐ Special shout outs to Hieu Ngo for keeping the project on track amidst competing priorities.
highlight.author: Jacquie West

jordan.name: Jordan McGhee
jordan.quote: The backend redesign has made our system significantly more efficient. Reporting workflows are much faster.

mckeen.name: McKeen Smith LLC
mckeen.quote: Transactions now load very fast, even for large datasets. This is a big improvement to user experience.

john.name: John Thacker
john.quote: I'm impressed with the solid patterns and refactoring in your latest merge requests.

about.title: Technical Lead · Senior Full-Stack Engineer
about.tagline: Building scalable systems, stabilizing complexity and helping teams execute with clarity.
about.card1Body: When projects become messy, my first instinct is to identify the real blocker, assess the risk level and organize the problem into manageable parts before execution.
about.card2Body: I prefer researching deeply before asking for help, communicating issues early and helping teams stay aligned on priorities, scope and execution.
about.card3Body: I guide people toward solutions rather than hand-holding every step. I value ownership, initiative and engineers who think proactively before escalating issues.
about.beyondParagraph: Outside of engineering, I enjoy quiet and detail-oriented hobbies that reflect how I think — calm, observant and naturally drawn toward structure, aesthetics and long-term craftsmanship.
about.closingLine: I enjoy turning complex and messy situations into systems people can actually work with.

skills.subtitle: Full-stack engineering, system architecture and the operational complexity that defines senior work.

frontend.title: Frontend & UI
frontend.statement: Delivering performant, accessible UIs with modern component-driven architecture.

backend.title: Backend & Architecture
backend.statement: Designing scalable services, APIs and data-intensive systems at production scale.

operational.title: Operational Thinking
operational.statement: How I analyze complexity, manage risk and stabilize delivery under pressure.

domain.title: Domain Experience
domain.statement: Real operational complexity across enterprise, financial and platform systems.
